---
title: "John Smith"
subtitle: "Former Postdoc (2021–2024) · now at XYZ University"
image: /images/portraits/placeholder.svg
role: alumni        # informational; alumni live in the members/alumni/ folder
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: globe
      text: Website
      href: "https://example.com"
---

*(Example alumni — replace or delete.)* John was a postdoc in the lab and now
runs his own research group studying boreal forest dynamics.
